raw_response: Given your quality sensitivity and brand familiarity with Sony, the WH-1000XM5 headphones are an excellent choice for office work. They offer industry-leading noise cancellation and a comfortable fit, ideal for long hours at your desk. With a battery life of up to 30 hours, you won't need frequent recharges. Though they are on the pricier side, their sound quality and wireless features justify the cost.
